name: Wilted Mustard Greens (Hl)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size saute pan on medium heat or flame, add the oil.
2. Add shallots and sauté quickly for 10 to 15 seconds.
3. Add mustard greens and sauté for 15 seconds.
4. Swirl in the vinegar and season with pepper.
5. Serve immediately.
Total cooking time: 2 minutes
Yield: 2 servings
